feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Excel Upload By RAP Without Extending on SAP BTP/Business Application Studio Platform?
entry.content:
I want to Upload Data by Excel using RAP Applications, without Extending this Service on SAP BTP Platform Bcoz in my case we dont have any BTP Subscription.

I Already go through with this Blog and it is working fine but here we need to extend the service on BTP Platform. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/excel-upload-using-rap-part-1/ba-p/13545399

So please suggest how we can acheive the same using RAP Application Only.

entry.title: Tables on Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Fellow SAP Practitioners,

I am curious to know, how we can get tables, data storage views in cloud?

entry.title: Odata API External Scheduler Integration Problem
entry.content:
I can't using api GET ApplicationLogMessageSet in group External Scheduler Integration. Option $expand in api ApplicationLogHeaderSet return same error and status code(500).

Base URL is my url system tenant SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud. 

In Eclipse ADT tool. SAP Gateway Error log return this log error. 

Is error of SAP API or I do something wrong? Give me help.

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Is there a special API for Invoices Pending Collection?
entry.content:
The customer is preparing to go live with the S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition and plan to use an API to retrieve customer invoice data. This API "Customer Invoice - Send (B2B

Is there a special API for Invoices Pending Collection?
If so, Does it have a cost?

entry.title: DDIC_TYPE in Custom Logic for Workflow
entry.content:
I tried adding the 'Cost Center' Pre-Condition in Wokflow for Parked Invoice as Complete and it worked.

Then now I try to make a selection from 'Cost Center' which is like search help but when I apply ddic_type 'KOSTL' Search help cost center doesn't appear

 

but when I change ddic_type to BUKRS the search help appears.

Thank You.

entry.title: Down payments for Service Item Cat. Serv.(S4HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi

  1. The client is using down payments(DB1) for item category group CBOR. So when the client created an order with the material having item category group CBOR. In Item Category column CB1 pop up & client changes the item category to DB1.

 

2.The client wants to give down payments for item category group SERV, however I am not to add DB1

 

In this case do we need to create new entry for OR/SERV/CB1 so that DB1 can be picked similarly to the print screen mentioned for CBOR.

Kindly Advice

entry.title: Error during test of BPA Store BOT - SAP Build Process Automation Fixed Asset Management - Post Asse
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

We are trying to leverage the SAP BPA Store Bot "SAP Build Process Automation
Fixed Asset Management - Post Asset Acquisition ". we have deployed the project and when we try to trigger an instance for this project from Monitoring section, we are getting below error.

could you please share any inputs on this?

 

"An error occurred while processing your request. Retry later or contact the service provider."

entry.title: Batch expiry date consideration in aATP
entry.content: We are implementing public cloud 2402 with aATP the client wants to be able to consider the expiry date in the determination of the promise date. For example customer A requires at least 300 days remaining life but customer B will take 200 days remaining life. If I have stock with 250 days remaining life I can confirm order for customer B but not customer A. Is there a way of doing this without doing batch determination and assigning a batch in the sales order line (which the customer is not keen on)?

entry.title: PR approval flow in 2NV scenario
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We are implementing SAP Ariba Guided Buying and SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the 2NV scenario. 

Do you have any experiences to share regarding the PR approval flow in that case? How is it managed in SAP Ariba Guided Buying? We know that the best practice is to do it in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud but it seems to be quite limited on a business perspective. 

As PR changes cannot be done in SAP Ariba Guided Buying for fully approved PR, how are you managing approvals for PR changes? 

Thank you

entry.title: Assing Cost Centers - OVF3 - Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working in S/4 Hana cloud public and I would like to determine the cost center by order reason in sales document. It was possible by the customizing of OVF3 (ECC - On premise) but I was not able to find it in CBC.

Do you know if it is still possible ?

Thanks.

Regards,

Nicolas BOUILLET.

entry.title: Production order reservation still exists after TECO
entry.content:
Hello,

There are many production orders that have been technically completed (TECO) without the consumption of some materials. These components have been deleted from the production order components list.

However, even after the production order is in TECO status, the component reservations still exist.

Could you please explain why this happens? Is there a way to delete the reservations automatically when the materials are deleted from the production order or when the order gets technically completed?

Thank you.

entry.title: Subscribe/Webhook S4Hana Public Cloud to its own events. Is that possible?
entry.content:
Hi all,

this is the case. We have a specific change on an object (not a bopf object so no option to catch the events on-stack) and we send the events to the event mesh. All is fine. It looks like this:

The events are received in the Event mesh instance triggered by the creation of the Cloud Extensibility Service. 

We also created a second instance which subscribes to the initial generated event mesh instance. This instance has a different namespace and is subscribed to the topics. I adjusted the Service Descriptor to accept queues/topics from different namespace.

The thing is: I want to subscribe my S4HPC instance to one of the queues which is available, but everytime I want to subscribe, the namespace needs to be the same as the initial eventmesh instance setup by the cloud extensibility service. The problem is that I can't create a queue on that initial instance because the topics are not conform the rules (which I can't change because it is generated by the cloud extensibility service). Still with me? 🙂

So what I want is: Trigger an event from s4hpc and receive it in eventmesh. The subscribed eventmesh should be able to push the message to the s4hpc system using a webhook. Or.... s4hpc needs to be able to subscribe to the queue and receive the events (which I can tackle using Event consumption model class in abap).

The questions:

  1. is it even possible to receive events from event mesh IN s4h public cloud?
  2. If we would go for a webhook, what would the address be of the public cloud tenant?
  3. I can reroute the event mesh to CPI and trigger an API on the s4hpc side, but I really would like to use the event consumption model idea.

I hope you can help. I know the tutorials of S4 to Eventmesh to build or whatever, but it really is about the way back to S4HPC.

Kind regards and all the best

Laurens

Cloud extensibility generated instance

my own subscriber instance

The subscription attempt in my communication scenario:

The cloud extensibility generated one can't actually have a queue with the two events being received in the queue. It is only a distributer.

entry.title: Consignment Fill-Up - Intrastat Declaration
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working on S4H Cloud public environment and I would like to know if it is possible to report the transfert to a consignement stock (CCFU) ? Indeed, we did not create any invoice so I don't know how I can get the lines.

 

Thanks in advance,

Regards,
Nicolas.

entry.title: Automatic Account Determination content download - S4 public cloud
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

has anyone ever needed to download the full content of the automatic account determination app?

Is there a way? Any way?

entry.title: CIM- Unable to submit invoices SCIM, system is showing error message a technical error occurred.
entry.content:
CIM- Unable to submit invoices, system is showing error message a technical error occurred. The invoice could not be saved in the connected system. Please try again later. If the problem persists, contact your administrator.

Central invoice management system is keep showing the error message for all of the company codes, we have verifiried the connection set up in BTP, its showing connection to S4 is good. Did anyone else has faced this issue earlier or any suggestion to look into this error message.

there is no message number assigned in the

entry.title: Message =Data loss occurred when converting 20244900000941
entry.content:
I am Trying to create a custom situation handling scenario where a notification will be triggered after every FG Goods movement, it will help the Logistic team to plan dispatch activities.

For this purpose I have created a custom situation object using Event Object "CL_MMIM_MATDOC_EVENT" i.e Material Document Created. And further created Situation Scenario and Type Accordingly. When I run the Situation type using batch trigger i get the appropriate notification

 

But when triggering an Event I get the following Error "Message =Data loss occurred when converting 20244900000941" it is unable to separate Document Year and Number.

Thanks & Regards

Ashish Talekar

Situation Handling SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud @Saumitra

entry.title: How to change the form title of the dunning notice output
entry.content:
We would like to change the form title of the dunning notice.

For billing document form title we can do via SSCUI 102402 Define Billing Types for Sales.

(KBA 3004546 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3004546)

But where I can do the same for dunning notice and letter?

entry.title: Mapping fields of inbound delivery to 3pl
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I have s4 hana cloud private edition and i need to make outbound interface between s4 hana to 3pl when inbound delivery created automatically against purchase order and it can be achieved through standard SOAP API Consumption in SAP ABAP. So i want the whole process for fields mapping of inbound delivery between s4 hana and 3pl. 

Thank for your help.

Sarvesh

entry.title: Customer service process tutorials for inhouse process(3XK), on-site process, service orders
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am looking for tutorials for customer services (In house repair, On-site Repair) in sap Hana public cloud.

Kindly do needful.

Thanks & Regards,

Rajeswari. B

entry.title: WHERE CAN I FIND CONFIGURATION GUIDES FOR S/4 HANA 2308
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm working on S/4 HANA Public Cloud and need the Configuration Guides for the Treasury area. Many thanks for pointers on where these resources are on SAP's world wide web!
